hooks.command: cd /Users/tanishqsingh/.claude && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then git commit -m "auto: sync claude config $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null && git push claude-god-setup main 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage": "Changes committed and pushed to claude-god-setup"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage": "No changes to commit"}'; fi
